scripts.build:vscode: npm run build:server && npm run compile -w clients/VSCode && shx mkdir -p clients/VSCode/out/server/bin && shx cp dist/server/* clients/VSCode/out/server/bin/
scripts.build:vscode:allseas: npm run build:server:allseas && npm run compile -w clients/VSCode && shx mkdir -p clients/VSCode/out/server/bin && shx cp dist/server/* clients/VSCode/out/server/bin/
scripts.package:vscode: npm run build:server && npm run package:no-verify -w clients/VSCode
scripts.package:vscode:allseas: npm run build:server:allseas && npm run package:no-verify -w clients/VSCode
scripts.launch:vscode: npm run package:vscode && find . | grep '.vsix' | xargs -i code --install-extension {} && code ./test
scripts.launch:vscode:allseas: npm run package:vscode:allseas && find . | grep '.vsix' | xargs -i code --install-extension {} && code ./test
scripts.package:jetbrains: npm run build:server && cd clients/JetBrains/go-text-template && ./gradlew clean buildPlugin --no-build-cache --no-configuration-cache && find ./build/distributions | grep '.zip' | xargs -i mv {} ../../../go-template-jetbrains.zip
scripts.package:jetbrains:allseas: npm run build:server:allseas && cd clients/JetBrains/go-text-template && ./gradlew clean buildPlugin -Pallseas --no-build-cache --no-configuration-cache && find ./build/distributions | grep '.zip' | xargs -i mv {} ../../../go-template-jetbrains.zip
scripts.package:both: npm run package:vscode & p1=$!; npm run package:jetbrains & p2=$!; wait $p1; r1=$?; wait $p2; r2=$?; exit $((r1 | r2))
scripts.package:both:allseas: npm run package:vscode:allseas & p1=$!; npm run package:jetbrains:allseas & p2=$!; wait $p1; r1=$?; wait $p2; r2=$?; exit $((r1 | r2))
